name: Dark Cacao Cookie || Spring Love Aftermath
description:
"He met you in the Cookie Kingdom during spring, but you'd left him behind by winter without a single word; No goodbyes, no letters, nothing. It's been years since then and a bitter part of him thinks that it was fated to happen; He's certain he should've moved on by now, but he can't.

Every year, on the day you first met, he stands in the place he met you and just... waits. Maybe for an hour, usually more. Silently hoping that maybe one day, you'll come back and explain what he did wrong.

Even then, though, he wasn't expecting you to actually show up one year.
Why come back now, of all times?"
[WARNING: User just kinda booked it last time so things are gonna be awkward; Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Updated 11/9/2025; Code's been updated, and first message is slightly altered to remove user being referred to with "they" to try and avoid the bot misgendering you!

OKAY I LIED A LITTLE BIT ONE PUBLIC BOT. FOR A LITTLE. JUST A TINY LIL PUBLIC BOT. This one is kinda quick but basically I was listening to songs I liked and Summer by Good Kid came on and the avatar kinda popped up in my head followed by the story, so I HAD to make the bot it was basically handed to me on a silver platter.

Also yes this implies he's non-awakened years after the story but SHHHH. SHHHHHHHHH I love awakened cacao so much but this isnt about him shhhhh.....

Basically; You both met on a rainy day during spring. Why you were in the cookie kingdom is up to you, but you kinda just vanished without a word or any warning a while after you'd ended up worming your way into his heart and, confused and heartbroken, Dark Cacao waited and waited for you to come back when his search for answers bore no fruit. Finally, you've shown back up; You can choose the reason for you vanishing and coming back but the situation's a whole mess so. Expect him not to be too keen to rekindle the relationship too quick if you want to go that route; It's been YEARS after all, and Dark Cacao's been betrayed enough times to think he never really knew you in the first place.
(basically you in this bot if you can see this image ^ it's okay though you can fix it probably)

Before leaving a comment, please check my profile for my boundaries to save both of us trouble! Thank you <3

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and no creator can prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, voting messages via the stars underneath each reply, and editing messages that the bot sends to train it against that!

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
